state.next-action: Phase `18` is still in progress on `18-05`. The shared-section authoring work from `18-01` through `18-04` remains complete, and a follow-up corrective migration now patches the previously incomplete `composer_reusable_*` schema across both live page block tables and `_pages_v` version block tables so deployed runtime draft queries can read shared-section metadata safely again. With the production schema regression closed, resume `18-05`: lightweight restore flows for shared-section versions and page versions without expanding into approvals, scheduling, or diff tooling.
